name: searchbefore
description: 噴前查正式發布建置與測試工具

scripts.release:check: npm run test && npm run build && node scripts/check-release.mjs
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run release:check && npx --yes firebase-tools@15.24.0 hosting:channel:deploy preview
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run release:check && npx --yes firebase-tools@15.24.0 deploy --only hosting
